title: 菊花賞の後に・本走にして助走

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite suffering another loss, Tamamo Cross
doesn't look entirely defeated as she looks out
onto the Kyoto track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The experience Tamamo Cross has picked up here
will lend itself well to the spring Tenno Sho,
another long-distance senior G1 race held in
Kyoto—and one that her father holds in high
regard.
